response.overview: Ayaz and Melis are a couple who want to get married. However, Melis's father sets a condition: "Your older sister must get married first." Disturbed by this, Ayaz devises a plan. He makes a deal with his rogue and con artist friend, Emir. According to the agreement, Ayaz will pay off all of Emir's debts. In return, Emir will marry Asiye, Melis's older sister, a rebellious, wild, and feisty woman who doesn't let any man near her.
response.title: Hircin Kiz
